mca-survey-analysis
  • Home
  • About
Manitoba Choral Association Stakeholder Feedback

Number of respondents: 242

Concerts attended # %
None 13 5.4%
1–2 70 28.9%
3–4 85 35.1%
5–6 41 16.9%
7 or more 30 12.4%
No response 3 1.2%
Choirs attended # %
Other choirs in Manitoba 148 61.2%
Dead of Winter 140 57.9%
The Winnipeg Singers 114 47.1%
Proximus 5 102 42.1%
Canzona 84 34.7%
Polycoro 54 22.3%

Compared to before the pandemic, how often do you attend choral concerts?

# %
More often 41 16.9%
About the same 127 52.5%
Slightly less often 46 19.0%
Much less often 19 7.9%
I did not attend concerts before the pandemic 9 3.7%

What usually motivates you to attend a choral concert?

value n pct
Interest in the program or repertoire 163 67.4%
Enjoyment of choral music in general 145 59.9%
Supporting a friend or family member performing 122 50.4%
Regular patron of a specific choir 77 31.8%
The overall concert experience 52 21.5%
Recommendation from someone 42 17.4%
The venue 39 16.1%
Advertising or promotion 35 14.5%
Other 18 7.4%

What factors might prevent you from attending a choral concert more often?

value n pct
Programs do not always interest me 110 45.5%
Too many events competing for my time 108 44.6%
Concert locations are not convenient 83 34.3%
I’m not always aware of upcoming concerts 71 29.3%
Ticket prices 57 23.6%
I already attend as often as I want 40 16.5%
Other 28 11.6%

Before receiving this survey, how aware were you of the range of professional choral organizations in Manitoba?

awareness n pct
Very aware 117 52.7%
Somewhat aware 84 37.8%
Not very aware 19 8.6%
Not aware at all 2 0.9%

In your experience, do the different professional choirs in Manitoba have clear and distinct identities or styles?

distinct_choirs n pct
Yes, very distinct 48 21.5%
Somewhat distinct 113 50.7%
Not very distinct 7 3.1%
I’m not sure 55 24.7%

How would you rate the value of choral concert tickets compared with other arts events you attendÉ

rate_value n pct
Excellent value 84 38.0%
Good value 99 44.8%
Fair value 30 13.6%
I’m not sure 8 3.6%

What ticket price range feels reasonable to you for a professional choral concert?

reasonable_price_range n pct
Under $20 7 3.2%
$20–30 84 38.4%
$30–40 109 49.8%
$40–50 17 7.8%
$50+ 2 0.9%

What other types of arts or cultural event do you attend?

value n pct
Symphony or orchestral concerts 158 65.3%
Theatre 143 59.1%
Other live performances 125 51.7%
Festivals 121 50.0%
Opera 101 41.7%
Visual arts exhibitions 94 38.8%
Jazz concerts 81 33.5%
None of the above 9 3.7%

Age group

age_group n pct
Under 25 2 0.9%
25–34 8 3.6%
35–44 25 11.4%
45–54 17 7.7%
55–64 38 17.3%
65+ 130 59.1%

Where do you currently live?

live n pct
Winnipeg 195 89.0%
Elsewhere in Manitoba 20 9.1%
Outside Manitoba 4 1.8%

How did you receive this survey?

received_from n pct
Dead of Winter 67 33.2%
The Winnipeg Singers 61 30.2%
Proximus 5 48 23.8%
Polycoro 20 9.9%
Social media 5 2.5%
Canzona 1 0.5%
